description: Machine-readable business rules for NirvaCore. Each rule is a when→then the engine can enforce. `rule_type`: validation | alert | calculation | control | policy. `severity`: block (hard stop) | warn | info. `source` cites the law/standard. `controls`/`standards` reference standards_kb. `automatable` = can run with no human in the normal path. Thai statutory figures are marked [verify] — they change; treat as defaults, confirm against current law.

rules.name: Late / no-show alert
rules.when: worker has assigned shift AND no verified check-in within 15 min of shift start
rules.then: notify site supervisor + flag required-vs-actual gap on EXECUTIVE dashboard

rules.name: Check-in integrity
rules.when: check-in lacks (geo within site fence) OR (liveness pass) OR (bound device)
rules.then: mark check-in unverified; do not count toward billable headcount; queue for review

rules.name: Impossible travel
rules.when: same worker checks in at two sites within a window shorter than travel time
rules.then: flag both check-ins as anomalous; alert ops + audit

rules.name: Contract headcount reconciliation
rules.when: billed headcount for a site-period > verified headcount
rules.then: block invoice approval until variance is explained & signed off

rules.name: Time-record lock before payroll
rules.when: payroll run initiated AND any time record in period is unlocked/editable
rules.then: block run until records are locked & approved (segregation of duties)

rules.name: Preparer ≠ approver
rules.when: payroll approver user == payroll preparer user
rules.then: block approval; require a different authorized approver

rules.name: OT rate calculation (Thai LPA)
rules.when: computing overtime pay
rules.then: OT on normal working day = 1.5x hourly; work on holiday (for daily-paid) +1x day rate; OT on holiday = 3x hourly [verify LPA 2541 current rules]
rules.source: พ.ร.บ.คุ้มครองแรงงาน 2541 (Labour Protection Act)

rules.name: Minimum wage floor
rules.when: computed daily wage < statutory provincial minimum wage
rules.then: block payroll; flag underpayment (legal risk)
rules.source: Minimum Wage Committee notifications [verify by province/year]

rules.name: Social Security deduction
rules.when: computing statutory deductions
rules.then: SSO = 5% of wage, base capped (default base 1,650–15,000 → max 750/mo each side) [verify current SSO rate]; remit via SSO e-service
rules.source: พ.ร.บ.ประกันสังคม (Social Security Act)

rules.name: Withholding tax PND.1
rules.when: paying employee salary
rules.then: compute PIT withholding per progressive table; file PND.1 monthly by the 7th (e-filing extended) [verify]

rules.name: Payslip data protection
rules.when: generating/storing payslips (personal + financial data)
rules.then: encrypt at rest, access on need-to-know, retain per schedule; no payslips via open LINE/email

rules.name: Biometric consent
rules.when: collecting face/biometric for check-in
rules.then: require explicit consent (sensitive data §26); offer non-biometric alternative; log consent

rules.name: RoPA maintained
rules.when: a new processing activity / data source is added
rules.then: create/update Record of Processing Activities entry with lawful basis, purpose, retention

rules.name: Data subject request SLA
rules.when: a data-subject access/erasure request is logged
rules.then: acknowledge and fulfil within statutory period [verify ~30 days]; record action

rules.name: Breach notification
rules.when: a personal-data breach is detected
rules.then: notify PDPC within 72 hours where required; notify data subjects if high risk; log incident

rules.name: CCTV signage & retention
rules.when: operating CCTV at a guarded/cleaned/managed site
rules.then: display notice, define lawful basis & retention, restrict access; cover in DPIA

rules.name: Three-way match
rules.when: approving vendor payment
rules.then: require PO + goods/service receipt + invoice to match within tolerance before pay

rules.name: PO-splitting detection
rules.when: multiple POs to same vendor just under an approval threshold within a short window
rules.then: flag possible split to evade authorization; route to audit

rules.name: Vendor due diligence
rules.when: onboarding a new vendor
rules.then: screen entity (registration, tax ID, beneficial owner, sanctions/conflict); store evidence

rules.name: Vendor bank = employee bank
rules.when: vendor payment bank account matches any employee bank account
rules.then: block payment; escalate to audit (fictitious-vendor indicator)

rules.name: WHT on service vendors
rules.when: paying a Thai service vendor
rules.then: withhold 3% (services) / 1% (transport) / 5% (rent) as applicable; issue WHT cert; file PND.3 (individual) or PND.53 (company) [verify rates]

rules.name: VAT on output
rules.when: issuing a service invoice as a VAT-registered entity
rules.then: charge output VAT 7% [verify]; issue compliant (e-)tax invoice; reconcile input/output; file PP.30 monthly by 15th [verify]

rules.name: Tax invoice completeness
rules.when: issuing/recording a tax invoice
rules.then: require seller TIN, buyer TIN, invoice no, date, description, VAT shown separately; reject if missing

rules.name: Document control
rules.when: a controlled document (SOP/policy/contract) is created or changed
rules.then: enforce version, approver, effective date, distribution & retention; supersede old version

rules.name: CAPA timeliness
rules.when: a nonconformity/CAPA is open past its due date
rules.then: escalate to QMR; flag on compliance dashboard (audit-readiness risk)

rules.name: Training matrix currency
rules.when: a role's required training/cert is expired or missing
rules.then: block assignment to safety-critical task; notify HR to schedule training

rules.name: Permit-to-work
rules.when: high-risk task (work at height, hot work, confined space, electrical)
rules.then: require approved permit + competency check + PPE confirmation before start
rules.source: ISO 45001; Thai OSH law (พ.ร.บ.ความปลอดภัยฯ 2554)

rules.name: Near-miss / incident capture
rules.when: an incident or near-miss is reported on site
rules.then: log with photo/time/location; trigger investigation if severity ≥ threshold

rules.name: Complaint logging & SLA
rules.when: a customer complaint is received (incl. via LINE)
rules.then: log, categorize, assign owner, resolve within SLA; link to CAPA if systemic

rules.name: CSAT trigger
rules.when: site CSAT or complaint trend crosses threshold
rules.then: alert account manager pre-renewal; flag churn risk on EXECUTIVE

rules.name: Human-in-the-loop for consequential decisions
rules.when: a NOVA agent produces a decision affecting pay, employment, vendor award, or compliance status
rules.then: require human review & sign-off before action; log decision + reviewer
rules.source: ISO 42001 / EU AI Act Art.14 / PDPA §automated decisions

rules.name: Agent action logging
rules.when: any NOVA agent reads/writes operational or personal data
rules.then: log actor, purpose, data touched, output; retain as AI governance evidence
